title: Apply Online for Aeroplan Credit Cards in Canada | TD Canada Trust
meta_description: Our best TD Aeroplan Credit Cards come with a wide range of benefits. TD Aeroplan Credit Cards earn Aeroplan points to use towards flights and offer Canadians travel flexibility and rewards. Visit TD to apply online today!

cards.title: TD® Aeroplan® Visa Infinite* Card
cards.description: Up to $1,350 in value^ including up to 40,000 Aeroplan points1 could be yours. Plus, receive an annual fee rebate for the first year1. Conditions Apply.

cards.title: TD® Aeroplan® Visa Infinite* Card
cards.description: Up to $1,350 in value^ including up to 40,000 Aeroplan points1 could be yours. Plus, receive an annual fee rebate for the first year1. Conditions Apply.

cards.title: TD® Aeroplan® Visa Platinum* Credit Card
cards.description: Up to $400 in value#, including up to 15,000 Aeroplan points2 could be yours, Plus, receive an annual fee rebate for the first year2. Conditions Apply.

cards.title: TD® Aeroplan® Visa Platinum* Credit Card
TD® Aeroplan® Visa Infinite Privilege* Credit Card
cards.description: Up to $3,000 in value* including up to 85,000 Aeroplan points3 could be yours. Conditions Apply.

cards.title: TD® Aeroplan® Visa Infinite Privilege* Credit Card
TD® Aeroplan® Visa* Business Card
cards.description: Up to 60,000 Aeroplan points4 could be yours with the TD® Aeroplan® Visa* Business Card4. Conditions Apply. Account must be approved, open and in Good Standing. Offer effective as of January 13, 2026.
